creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
These ports failed to patch:

devel/libpthread-stubs
devel/dbus-glib
devel/gio-fam-backend
deskutils/xneur


These ports are in conflict after updating the tree (many ports either
already have converted to pathfix, or added other USES) [this list is
hand written]:

Note that we cannot commit the patch as is as the tree is generally in
conflict with your patch now. Consider the following. There are now 2
USES but svn did not consider the file in conflict.

> ===================================================================
> --- devel/libgsf/Makefile       (revision 316808)
> +++ devel/libgsf/Makefile       (working copy)
> @@ -20,7 +20,8 @@
>  USE_GMAKE=     yes
>  USES=          gettext
>  USE_LDCONFIG=  yes
> -USE_GNOME?=    gnomehack gnomeprefix glib20 libxml2 ltverhack intlhack
> +USES=          pathfix
> +USE_GNOME?=     gnomeprefix glib20 libxml2 ltverhack intlhack
>  USE_AUTOTOOLS= libtool
>  CONFIGURE_ARGS?=--without-gnome-vfs --without-python --with-gio \
>                 --without-bonobo


I suggest rerolling the patch from scratch and excluding the
failed-to-patch list and we'll start over with review/testing.


-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
